The '''''Helix''-class light interceptor''' was an armed [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] manufactured by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] that could easily serve as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]. A second generation was also produced, the "Model B."

==Characteristics==
The original model of the interceptor had a Class 2 [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] [[GBp-625 hyperdrive]], whereas the Model B came with a Class 1 [[GBp-629 hyperdrive]].

Both variants of the craft had a [[LBE flight control computer]], 4 [[H-L Block ion drive]]s, a Class 12 backup hyperdrive, 80 fuel cells, and an atmospheric capability of 750 kilometers per hour along with great maneuverability.

A [[Duranium/Legends|duranium]]-[[kathor]] composite hull was protected by [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]]. The craft boasted 2 [[Plasburst laser cannon/Legends|Plasburst laser cannon]] belly turrets that could be fire-linked, 2 forward fire-linked [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], and 1 forward dorsal [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launcher that carried 5 [[Mark V-rated torpedo]]es.

==History==
The craft was only manufactured for 6 months before the [[Bureau of Ships and Services/Legends|Bureau of Ships and Services]] realized that Arakyd was manufacturing an illegally-armed "freighter". The Empire then mandated an end to the production, but that did not stop Arakyd from selling the existing craft.

The Empire demanded that all owners of such craft strip them down to meet [[Safe Starship Regulations]] and register the craft with the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]], but few people actually did so, and many [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] nobles maintained their ships as delivered.
